query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_html FROM categories WHERE nameEs LIKE '%<%' OR nameEn LIKE '%<%';
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_html FROM menu_items WHERE nameEs LIKE '%<%' OR nameEn LIKE '%<%' OR descriptionEs LIKE '%<%' OR descriptionEn LIKE '%<%';
